dep_arb:649396:649411:nested_implication.reason: VETO: nested_implication with weak entry (0.196 < 0.20), bucket bleeding (PF=0.884, 9% win-rate), and no grok_convergence_prior to validate cheap-entry hold-to-resolution viability. Scanner missed that 11-sample bucket shows systematic losses (-$4.46 avg). Entry below 0.20 on nested heuristic is high-risk without convergence confidence.

dep_arb:649510:649512:nested_implication.reason: VETO: nested_implication bind, poor bucket calibration (9% WR, PF=0.88, bleeding -$4.46 avg), entry_vwap 0.126 in losing bucket, mid_convergence shows mixed/poor results (50% converge_60s rate, negative decay patterns), hold-to-resolution appears unprofitable for this setup

dep_arb:649510:649521:nested_implication.reason: VETO: nested_implication heuristic bind with catastrophic bucket (0% win_rate, -$43 avg PnL, 0.0 PF on 5 trades). No grok_convergence_prior to override bucket bleeding.

dep_arb:649616:649625:nested_implication.reason: VETO: bucket 0-0.10 shows 0% win rate (0/5), -$42.79 avg PnL, PF=0.0 (pure bleeding). Entry at $0.052 is cheap but calibration catastrophic. Nested heuristic (single-child) less reliable than conjunction. High violation_magnitude (0.4) but empirical convergence data absent for this specific bind, and bucket suggests hold-to-resolution consistently loses.

dep_arb:649616:649633:nested_implication.reason: VETO: nested_implication bind at extreme entry_vwap=0.016 (<<0.20) with calibration_bucket 0-0.10 showing 0% win_rate (0/5), PF=0.0, avg_pnl=-42.79. Parent_up_mid=0.0045 is absurdly low vs child=0.505 â likely stale/noise not arb. Mid_convergence empirical shows mixed results (67% converge_60s) but bucket bleeding badly. dep_arb:649697:649710:nested_implication.reason: VETO: nested_implication heuristic bind; bucket 0.10-0.20 bleeding badly (PF=0.88, 1/11 wins); entry_vwap=0.186 is cheap but calibration shows systematic loss on this regime; mid_convergence empirics show gap inversions (recent bind 649697â649701 inverted -0.14@60s); no grok_convergence_prior to override; hold-to-resolution risk material with weak bucket

dep_arb:649697:649729:nested_implication.reason: VETO: nested_implication bind with low entry_vwap (0.193) in bleeding bucket (0.10-0.20: 9% WR, PF=0.88). Mid_convergence shows mixed convergence with frequent inversions (gaps going negative). Weak capture probability on cheap parent.

note.summary: Dep-arb realized -$407 on 127 settled trades with -18% capture ratio vs +$2226 theoretical hold-to-resolution. Nested execute blocked 438 trades, clock_skew rejected 764, and bucket_bleeding rejected 431 total. No verifier-approved trades exist (n=0); verifier veto had insufficient evidence (n=7) but would have saved -$350. Mid-exit at 60s shows 83% convergence but did not prevent massive bleed.

knob_recommendations.reason: nested_execute blocked 438 trades but dep-arb still lost -$407 on 127 settled; conjunction-only may reduce over-filtering without harming edge
clock_skew rejected 764 stale parent books; enabling may prevent entry on phantom convergence and reduce bucket_bleeding rejections
649 rejected for entry_vwap_above_cap at 0.52; tightening to 0.48 filters marginal entries contributing to -18% capture ratio
0 verifier-approved settled trades exist; requiring verdict gates all dep-arb until Claude maker-checker validates edge at settle (n>=10)

note.dep_arb_next_experiment: Disable nested_execute, enable clock_skew, lower max_entry_vwap to 0.48, and require verifier verdict to gate all dep-arb until n>=10 vetoes validate Claude maker-checker edge at settle.

new_lessons.rule: bucket_bleeding rejected 431 trades across all bands; dep-arb entries bleeding >10% at book time predict poor hold-to-resolution capture
mid_exit at 60s with 83% convergence did not prevent -18% capture ratio; bleed occurs before mid-convergence or mid-exit fails to capture theoretical edge
verifier_veto n=7 < 10 min; insufficient evidence to assess Claude maker-checker quality; must accumulate vetoes until ready_for_gate=true before enabling VERIFIER_REQUIRE
nested_execute blocked 438 trades but dep-arb still lost -$407; no evidence nested logic improves capture ratio vs conjunction-only execute

lessons.rule: if exec_gate rejects >80% candidates via single rule, that rule is miscalibrated; lower threshold and gather data
1-sample TradingView result (0% hit rate) is no evidence; need >=30 samples before using signal for any trade logic
6 trades cannot demonstrate edge in near-efficient 5-min BTC; any WR/PF claim requires >=50 settled, ideally 100+
If exec gate blocks >80% via single rule (underdog_price_floor=24/30), lower floor by 0.03â0.05 to test marginal candidates; measure incremental win rate
Do not infer TradingView signal edge from n<30 aligned trades; current 1-sample 0% hit rate is pure noise
When avg_loss > avg_win and profit_factor <1.0, tighten stop-loss or raise entry threshold; current structure guarantees slow bleed
6 settled trades cannot validate any 5-min BTC model; require â¥100 settled with stable win rate â¥55% before claiming edge
75% gate rejection (24/32) from underdog_price_floor; lower threshold cautiously to gather evidence
TradingView MTF signals 0/2 correct on settled outcomes; treat as uninformative until nâ¥30 with >55% hit rate
every dimensional bucket has nâ¤1; avoid conclusions until nâ¥10 per bucket with consistent WR
markov_state=stale_polymarket_down: 1 trade, 0% WR, -$5; flag as avoid until nâ¥10 reverses pattern
7 trades, 42.9% WR, profit factor 0.69, Brier 0.25 (at baseline): no evidence of edge over coinflip
if >70% execution candidates rejected by single rule, loosen that rule to gather sample
markov_state=stale_polymarket_down: 0% win rate, -$5 PnL (n=1). Avoid until n>=20 with WR>55%
require n>=30 settled trades per dimension bucket before exploit/avoid classification
50% win rate + profit factor <1.0 = no edge; costs exceed any directional signal, do not scale
If >60% gate rejections are underdog_price_below_floor, lower floor by 0.05 and re-test for 50 samples
hurst_regime=trending: 50% WR, -$0.20 PnL (n=2). Do not trade trending regime until n>=50 with WR>55%
Any context with n<20 is pure noise in 5-min BTC. Do not assign confidence tier above D until n>=20
Brier 0.236 vs baseline 0.25 shows minimal skill. Model needs re-training or feature engineering before claiming edge
markov_state=stale_polymarket_down: 0% win rate (n=1), -$5 PnL; suggests stale polymarket DOWN is faded incorrectlyâAVOID until n>=10
75% rejection rate (24/32) at execution gate (underdog_price_below_floor) starves sample accumulation; relax floor marginally to test more
All dimensions (hurst, zscore, ttc, edge_quality, spread, depth) show ~50% win rate, negative edge; no subsegment profitable at n=2-8âdo NOT trade
conviction_bucket <0.2: 0% win (n=1); conviction 0.2-0.4: 100% win (n=1); insufficient evidence but flag low conviction as risky
markov_state=stale_polymarket_down: 0% win, -$5 PnL (n=1)âhard-block this state
hurst_regime=trending shows 50% win on n=2; no edge vs randomâavoid until nâ¥30 proves otherwise
73% of gate candidates rejected for underdog_price_below_floor; either floor is miscalibrated or signals are weakâaudit threshold vs realized outcomes
avg_loss=$5.00 > avg_win=$4.63; asymmetry is backwardsâneed tighter stop-loss or better entry timing
zero A/B tier contexts; all settled buckets are C (losing/subcoinflip)âno regime has sample-backed edge yet
price floor rejecting 74% of gate candidates â loosen 0.02 to test if execution volume not edge is bottleneck
trending regime 33% WR n=3 $-5.20 â avoid until n>=20 proves otherwise
n<20 per context = noise not signal; require 20+ settled trades before exploit/avoid classification
only 4/14519 candidates executed â gate is primary bottleneck not directional filter quality
73% execution rejection via underdog_price_below_floor indicates floor is too conservative or market staleness; lower incrementally to test
hurst_regime=trending: 3 trades, 33% win-rate, -$5.20 PnL; avoid trending regimes until 20+ sample trend bucket shows >55% win-rate
high edge_quality bucket underperformed (33% WR, -$5.20); calibration or labeling error likely; audit edge_quality scoring
9 trades insufficient for live; need 100+ accepted with 55%+ WR and positive PF before claiming edge
If execution gate rejects 100% of recent candidates on one reason (underdog_price_below_floor=25), the knob is miscalibratedâlower floor incrementally to restore trade flow
markov_state=stale_polymarket_down: 1 trade, 0% win, -$5 PnL; this state signals market has already priced the moveâskip until markov calibration improves
edge_quality_bucket=high paradoxically delivered 33% win-rate, -$5.20 PnL; recalibrate edge scorer or rename bucketâcurrent 'high' label is anti-predictive
9 settled trades cannot distinguish skill from luck (95% CI on 44% win-rate: ~15-75%); require >=100 settled trades before claiming any edge
TradingView-aligned trades: 25% win-rate, -$2.55 avg; no-signal: 60% win-rate, +$0.75 avg. Alignment = negative edge.
100% of execution gate rejects (25/25) were underdog_price_below_floor; current floor is blocking all new candidates. Lower threshold to 0.45 to sample more underdog opportunities.
9 settled trades is statistically meaningless for 5-min BTC direction (near coin-flip). Require â¥100 settled before inferring any edge or contextual pattern.
44% WR, PF 0.74, negative PnL: no evidence of exploitable edge. Do not increase size, do not go live, do not assume TradingView or any feature predicts 5-min outcome.
Execution gate rejected 25 underdogs via price_below_floor; these would have bled capital. Floor is working.
9 trades cannot distinguish skill from noise. Need 100+ settled with consistent positive edge before any live consideration.
Brier 0.254 vs baseline 0.25: model adds no information. Edge model calibration shows no predictive separation.
TradingView lite-2 DOWN signals: 25% hit rate (vs 44% base), -$2.55 avg PnL; treat as negative signal until N>50
Trades without TradingView signal: 60% WR, +$0.75 avg; current feature stack may add noise, not signal
73% execution rejection rate (25/34) at current floor indicates filter calibration failure; must retune or accept severe flow throttle
100% of trades were DOWN (0 UP); either UP filter overly strict or market regime heavily bearish; verify UP candidate generation
